pages.description: TEXT + TABLE category stress — 2000p, 800 spans, 100 code/pre, 100×15 financial table
PII detector scan — 3400 isolated spans (1500 email, 500 phone, 500 currency, 500 numeric, 400 suppressed) + 600 inline-prose paragraphs
All 5 blur categories simultaneously — account dashboard. TEXT:400, MEDIA:70, FORM:130, TABLE:320 cells, STRUCTURE:50
Reveal controller latency — 100 flat targets, 20 nested cascade groups, 50 inline-span paragraphs. Blur applied via extension storage.
Picker activation + zone drawing — dashboard layout with fixed nav, sticky sidebar, fixed right panel, scrollable main (≥3500px)
SPA navigation — 5 routes (text/forms/table/media/mixed), MutationObserver reconcile per pushState. Table route: 100×50 (5000 cells).
FORM category + ARIA role selectors — 80 native inputs, 30 selects, 10 textareas, 20 buttons, 75 ARIA-role elements
MEDIA category stress — 150 img (3 size classes), 30 video (canvas.captureStream autoplay), 15 canvas, 15 svg, 15 picture, 10 audio, 20 figure
